title: Sync the description of an Activity across multiple boards. (Opportunities board and My Activity board)
excerpt: I’d like the description of an activity to automatically sync across boards. We are capturing activities within our Opportunities board and then using the My Activities board to focus on our To Do List for the day. Curre…

posts.author: adowell (A. Dowell)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like the description of an activity to automatically sync across boards. We are capturing activities within our Opportunities board and then using the My Activities board to focus on our To Do List for the day. Currently, as we revise the notes under descriptions it does not automatically sync to the other boards. This means we are often looking at old information. Our team is scheduling activities in advance and then coming back to them to update their notes on how they went.

posts.author: rodneyz (Rodney)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @adowell , we’ve developed an app that does exactly that. We would love for you to check out our app and let us know if this achieves your desired results.

Link to our App in the Marketplace
